response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with broad polyglot experience, but the role specifically requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership, distributed systems at scale, or formal technical lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers. Core stack is JS/TS/DLang, not C++.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching ability through workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
Founder-level ownership of an open source geo-data platform deployable on Kubernetes
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
No evidence of large-scale distributed systems, cloud compute platform, or hardware architecture work
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems scale
Breadth of engineering experience and mentoring
